result.stdout:
Description:
  Converts font files to Walgelijk font archives

Usage:
  Walgelijk.FontGenerator [options]

Options:
  --input <input>          Path to input file or directory [default: .]
  --output <output>        Path to output file. Does nothing if the input is a directory. []
  --charset <charset>      Path to text file containing all to-be-encoded characters. ASCII by default. []
  --font-size <font-size>  Font size to render the font with. Effectively determines bitmap resolution. [default: 48]
  --version                Show version information
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Converts font files to Walgelijk font archives

Usage:
  Walgelijk.FontGenerator [options]

Options:
  --input <input>          Path to input file or directory [default: .]
  --output <output>        Path to output file. Does nothing if the input is a directory. []
  --charset <charset>      Path to text file containing all to-be-encoded characters. ASCII by default. []
  --font-size <font-size>  Font size to render the font with. Effectively determines bitmap resolution. [default: 48]
  --version                Show version information
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information
